data.name: Slave Harem
data.detailed_description:
What to expect from this game

This is a short-ish (2-4 hours) adventure game. This is NOT card-battler, it has classic turn-based combat represented with card-like visuals - optional, can be skipped.

It's a low-budget game made mostly by one person.

If you encounter some bugs/crashes, please report them so I can try fixing them.

Instructions on how to do it, as well as possible solutions are in the Community Hub.


Full Controller Support

Use an Xbox-compatible or PlayStation 4/5 controller for the best experience!


關於此遊戲

BECOME THE BEST ADVENTURER... WITH HELP OF YOUR SLAVES! 🐇

Kicked out of your party, your only hope is to get slaves for companions. Will you take the side quests and engage in fights? Or do you just want to learn more about the world and characters? You decide!

EXPLORE 3D ENVIRONMENTS - GATHER, FIGHT, FISH, INVESTIGATE ANCIENT RUINS

Walk across small, hand-crafted areas. Fulfill side quests, and learn more about your companions. Then return to town and report your progress!

15 INTERACTIVE SEX SCENES WITH 10 DIFFERENT CHARACTERS!

Get intimate with your friends as you progress. Customize speed, expression, and select animation style!


Features:
  • Skip fights if you just want to enjoy the story
  • One-handed controls - all gameplay mechanics can be operated only with the mouse
  • 3D RPG-esque adventuring bringing a new layer to the narrative
  • Variety of characters of different races, backgrounds, and tropes, including: MILFs, tomboys, shy scholar, mysterious smith, clumsy receptionist, and more!

data.short_description: Adult-Only Adventure with RPG elements, 3D world exploration, and turn-based combat. Restore your honor and prove everyone wrong.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E8200
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated graphics with full Vulkan 1.2 support
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-9300HF
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 Ti

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Any x86_64 CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Full Vulkan 1.0 or OpenGL 3.3 support
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

  • OS: Windows 10

  • Storage: 800 MB available space
